title: The Night You Were Born
tagline: Type a date and place; watch the same sky return exactly as it was.
holy_shit: With no backend and no telescope, your browser can recompute the real sky over any birthplace from date + coordinates alone — and it keeps turning like that night never ended.
powered_by: in-browser sidereal-time astronomy: bright-star RA/dec catalog rotated into local alt/az plus moon phase from date
weld: Transplants Taste the Weather's quiet single-panel restraint and Gravity Organ's canvas animation, then welds deterministic astronomy math so date+longitude alone reconstructs a real sky with moon phase.
agent_scenario: When you need an emotional, no-backend visualization where a personal input (date/place) deterministically recomputes a real physical state in-browser.
author: kody-w + Copilot
